Name Variants: Before using this template DELETE everything except for the headings in Row 1 of those parameters you want to submit.
It is IMPORTANT that the file contains column headings of ONLY the parameters you want to change, because
if you have a heading with an otherwise empty column then Router will delete all existing parameters of that type.
If a heading is omitted from the file, then any existing matching parameters of that type will remain unaffected.
The number of columns and order of columns is flexible.
You could choose to submit a single CSV file containing all the parameter types you wish to load or,
alternatively you could submit separate CSV files, each containing a single parameter type; or some other variation
such as one file containing 3 types of parameter (e.g. Name variants, Domains, Postcodes, Organisation identifiers) and
(Rows 2 to 8 above show example data.  Note the various options for Organisation Identifiers. These are case insensitive and
can be entered as either URLs or "type: value" strings; also, labels for ISNI and RINGGOLD can be shortened to ISN and RIN).
